name: paper
description: /paper <args> — arxiv-style LaTeX paper scaffolder (v0.7 verbs). Core verbs: new <slug> · sample <slug> · fig <size> <prompt> <out.png> · compile [dir] (xelatex × 3 + bibtex) · lint [dir] (extended commons @D g51) · list · help. New v0.7 verbs: companion init (scaffold companion/ in cwd) · outline [dir] (print main.tex sections / figures / tables TOC) · pipeline <stage1> <stage2> ... (emit §Full Pipeline LaTeX table skeleton, each row pre-filled with 🟠 tier) · atoms <domain> (scan ~/core/hexa-lang/tool/verify_cli.hexa for atoms matching <domain>) · verify-block <fn> <args...> <expected> (run hexa verify from canonical root, emit ready-to-paste \begin{lstlisting} block; surfaces raw output even when verdict ≠ 🔵/🟢) · bib add <doi-or-arxiv> (fetch metadata via CrossRef/arxiv API, append bibtex entry) · pr-roll <repo> <since-ref> (gh PR list, emit \paragraph + companion/pr-roll.json) · arxiv-prep [<dir>] (out/<slug>-arxiv.tar.gz with arxiv-mandatory files + 1-tex + .bbl validation).
